ViewmastR inference

viewmastR_infer.Rd

This function performs cell type inference using a trained model, passing sparse matrices directly to Rust for maximum performance.

Usage

viewmastR_infer(
  query_cds,
  model_dir,
  selected_features,
  query_celldata_col = "viewmastR_inferred",
  labels = NULL,
  verbose = TRUE,
  return_probs = FALSE,
  return_type = c("object", "list"),
  batch_size = NULL,
  threads = 1
)

Arguments

query_cds

Seurat or cell_data_set object

model_dir

Path to the trained model directory

selected_features

Character vector of feature names

query_celldata_col

Name of column to store results (default: "viewmastR_inferred")

labels

Optional character vector of class labels

verbose

Print progress messages

return_probs

If TRUE, add probability columns to metadata

return_type

"object" returns the modified object, "list" returns object and probs

batch_size

Cells per inference batch (default: auto)

threads

Number of parallel threads (default: 1)

Value

Modified query_cds with inferred labels

On this page
